## Problem

<!-- What problem are we solving, and for whom? Lead with the user / buyer outcome, not the implementation. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One paragraph. Describe the change at the level of "what the user sees" or "what the system does". Implementation detail goes in a follow-up design issue if needed. -->

- [ ] AIOps console / product UI
- [ ] Design system / tokens
